name: 6th Annual Congressional Briefing WOC Blockchain
description:
Join us for the 6th Annual Congressional Briefing of Women of Color in Blockchain on December 10 at 11:30AM in the U.S. Capitol Visitors Center (SVC-201). Special speakers include U.S. Representatives Darren Soto (FL-09) and Warren Davidson (OH-08), SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce, Blockchain Association CEO Summer Mersinger, Filecoin Foundation President & Chair Marta Belcher.

This year's theme is "Stable Futures Need Stable Leaders." Event sponsors are Polychain Capital, Solana Policy Institute, Blockchain Association, Blockchain Foundation.

Since 2019, we have collaborated with Blockchain Association, Polychain Capital, and various industry partners to convene a Delegation of female leaders from across the country in the nation’s Capitol to spotlight executives, experts, founders, developers leveraging blockchain and cryptocurrency.

The annual forum features Members of Congress, top Washington Officials, and leaders of public institutions. For more information, contact Cleve@TheBlockFound.com.
